author: Austin Williamson
review: Absolutely horrendous accommodations for students. Complete inflexibility and total managerial incompetence. After learning that I could not break my lease or transfer my lease to a third-party, the leasing office was barely tolerable

ownerResponse.text: Hi Austin, this is Kailey with the Customer Service team. Thank you for the feedback. I am sorry to hear about your frustrations with your lease takeover at the community. It was the worst timing for our phone line to go down, we're so sorry that we missed your applicants. I understand our manager is working with accounting to get this resolved for you. We wish you the best. Take care, Kailey

author: Nate Lloyd
review:
Changed my initial review after having lived here for a year.

Absolutely horrible!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Nate, this is Kailey with Customer Service. I see you left similar feedback on multiple sites. We strive to offer outstanding service and value with every single interaction. We apologize if we missed the mark, but were always grateful for feedback. Please consider contacting our Customer Service department directly to try and resolve any outstanding issues you may have. We can be reached at customerservice@plpinc.net or via phone at 425-287-7438. Thanks and take care.

author: Sarah Taylor
review: Management is like a rotating door through here. You're guaranteed to see an entirely different crew of people by the time you finish your lease. The apartments are cheaply made and fall apart. Don't fall for their "bundle utilities"

author: K. M.
review:
Have to change my review.

Avoid at all costs. Management is a joke, repairs of serious nature are rarely

ownerResponse.text: Hi there, this is Kailey with the Customer Service team. Thank you for the feedback. I am sorry to hear about your frustrations at the community. I would love the opportunity to speak with you in greater detail regarding your concerns so I can help address. Please feel free to contact me directly at 425-287-7438 or email at customerservice@plpinc.net Take care, Kailey

author: Rachel Sandal
review: Management and staff have been rude and somewhat unresponsive to our needs/questions. People have entered our apartment without any notice at all and it was scary! That experience left my roommates and I shaken up. In talking to the leasing

author: Cameron Smith
review: Overpriced and brittle apartments. Everything breaks apart, they charge you for every little thing and management lies to you. They provide absolutely no help with trying to move out and they pretend to care about residents. I hate living here and I have already recommended to several friends to STAY AWAY

ownerResponse.text: Hi Cameron, this is Kailey with Customer Service. We strive to offer outstanding service and value with every single interaction. We apologize if we missed the mark, but were always grateful for feedback  constructive and otherwise. We tried to locate you in our database and were unable to find any prior or current resident with your name, so our team is wondering if you've found the correct community to review. Please consider contacting our Customer Service department directly to try and resolve any outstanding issues you may have if you did indeed live at our Bellingham location. We can be reached at customerservice@plpinc.net or via phone at 425-287-7438. Thanks and take care.

author: Debbie Schmidt
review: Update:  More collections calls. I sent in all the proof I had explaining the situation and showing all the sites that currently show no availability. They are supposed to attempt to re rent the unit. Month after month it shows no

ownerResponse.text: Hi Debbie, this is Kailey from Customer Service. Thank you for the feedback. I am sorry to hear about your frustrations with the lease break policy. I see you've left the same review on multiple sites. Our regional manager is available to speak with you directly should you like to contact him, he is reachable at 916-399-3227. Please share these photos to customerservice@plpinc.net Thanks and take care, Kailey

author: Tiger Rabbit
review: terrible  management.  the floor makes super loud noise.  I literally can hear every movement my upper floor made.   I told the manager and staff in the office,  and no one give a f.

author: Ethan Marquardt
review: Too expensive for what the units have to offer. Look for better alternatives.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Ethan, this is Kailey from Customer Service. Thank you for the feedback. I am sorry to hear that we fell short of expectations. I have found that we priced fairly with the market, although I personally wish I didn't have to pay rent too! I would love to chat more with you to find out what alternatives you would prefer so we can continue to better the community. Please feel free to contact me directly at 425-287-7438 or email me at customerservice@plpinc.net Take care, Kailey

author: Lauren S
review: An apartment is an apartment but this place is mediocre at best and horribly overpriced

ownerResponse.text: Hi Lauren, this is Kailey from Customer Service. I wish I could control the rental market prices but because we have such a strong market that is what dictates the pricing. Please feel free to call or email directly at 425-287-7438 or customerservice@plpinc.net if there is something more I could handle for you. Take care, Kailey
Thanks for showing your support for The U! We appreciate it :)
